vocab.example: We need to reconcile the bank statement with our records.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta cần đối chiếu sao kê ngân hàng với sổ sách của mình.

vocab.example: This transaction isn't showing up in the ledger yet.
vocab.example_vi: Giao dịch này chưa xuất hiện trong sổ cái.

vocab.example: There's a mismatch between the invoice and the payment amount.
vocab.example_vi: Có sự chênh lệch giữa hóa đơn và số tiền đã thanh toán.

vocab.example: Can you explain the variance between the two reports?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể giải thích sự chênh lệch giữa hai báo cáo không?

vocab.example: I always cross-check the numbers before closing the books.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi luôn kiểm tra chéo số liệu trước khi chốt sổ.

vocab.example: We had to adjust an entry after finding the error.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi phải điều chỉnh một bút toán sau khi phát hiện lỗi.

vocab.example: The closing balance should match the bank statement exactly.
vocab.example_vi: Số dư cuối kỳ phải khớp chính xác với sao kê ngân hàng.

vocab.example: Please confirm the opening balance for this quarter.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng xác nhận số dư đầu kỳ cho quý này.

lines.speaker: Hoa (accountant)
lines.text: Duc, can you help me reconcile the accounts this morning?

lines.speaker: Duc (finance staff)
lines.text: Sure, are the numbers not matching the ledger?

lines.speaker: Hoa (accountant)
lines.text: Right, there's a mismatch between the invoice and the payment.

lines.speaker: Duc (finance staff)
lines.text: Let me check the variance between the two reports.

lines.speaker: Hoa (accountant)
lines.text: Please cross-check the figures with last month's statement too.

lines.speaker: Duc (finance staff)
lines.text: Okay, I found it. We forgot to adjust an entry last week.

lines.speaker: Hoa (accountant)
lines.text: Good catch. Can you fix it before we confirm the closing balance?

lines.speaker: Duc (finance staff)
lines.text: Yes, I'll update it now and recalculate everything.

lines.speaker: Hoa (accountant)
lines.text: Great, and please confirm the opening balance for next month.

lines.speaker: Duc (finance staff)
lines.text: Sure, I'll send both figures to you by lunchtime.

lines.speaker: Hoa (accountant)
lines.text: Thanks, Duc. This report needs to be accurate for the audit.

lines.speaker: Duc (finance staff)
lines.text: Understood, I'll double-check everything before I send it.

questions.q: What problem does Hoa find first?
options: A mismatch between invoice and payment

questions.q: What did Duc forget to do last week?
What does Hoa ask Duc to confirm for next month?

shadowing: Can you help me reconcile the accounts before lunch this morning?
There's a mismatch between the invoice and the actual payment amount.
Let me check the variance between these two monthly reports carefully.
We forgot to adjust an entry in the ledger last week.
Please confirm the opening balance for next month before Friday.
